prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: casserole dish, ceramic owl, boat key

Cast:
- Claire Marlowe | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.22 | space=marina tackle room described as just storage | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; once left town without explaining why
- Rachel Mercer | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.3 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=covered for someone out of shame; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Claire Lark | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.32 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Jenna Vale | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.56 | space=toolshed described as donation overflow | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Derek Hale | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.38 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=has a storage unit he refuses to explain
- Rachel Hawthorne | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.59 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Rachel Pruitt | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Jenna Dane | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Beat sheet:
- Act 1 Scene 1: Claire Marlowe relocates to Alder Ridge after an emotionally negligent implosion and pretends work explains everything while quietly inheriting marina tackle room described as just storage. Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Rachel Mercer is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Claire Marlowe says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Rachel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Rachel. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Claire. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Jenna."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

Write an expansion JSON object with exactly these keys:
- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
